/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/moves.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/engine.cpp.o -o chesseycpp  /usr/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-window.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-audio.so.3.0.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-system.so.3.0.2
